titleZh: Simon Willison｜Agent 与开发者工具
briefTitleZh: Simon Willison｜Agent 与开发者工具
kickerZh: Simon Willison · Agent 与开发者工具
kickerEn: Simon Willison · Agents and developer tooling
summaryZh: Simon Willison把工作流继续往产品和开发者工作流里压，重点已经不是演示能力，而是把模型能力变成可编排的执行链路。 Simon Willison想证明的不是模型更聪明，而是 agent 终于更像能进生产环境的工具…
summaryEn: Simon Willison moved workflow deeper into product and developer workflows, which is really about turning model capability into orchestrated execution workflows… The clearest public signal so far is this…
deckZh: Simon Willison把工作流继续往产品和开发者工作流里压，重点已经不是演示能力，而是把模型能力变成可编排的执行链路。
deckEn: Simon Willison moved workflow deeper into product and developer workflows…
narrativeZh: Simon Willison把工作流继续往产品和开发者工作流里压，重点已经不是演示能力，而是把模型能力变成可编排的执行链路。 Simon Willison想证明的不是模型更聪明，而是 agent 终于更像能进生产环境的工具。
目前能确认的公开信号是：Agentic Engineering Patterns > I use the term agentic engineering to des… 换句话说，行业现在卷的已经不是谁更会回答，而是谁更能把能力接进现有软件和流程。
接下来真正要看的，是这类能力会不会变成默认配置，而不是只存在于少数标杆案例里。后续要看它是否被嵌进真实产品和开发者工作流，以及生态是否围绕它形成新的分发与集成方式。
narrativeEn: Simon Willison moved workflow deeper into product and developer workflows, which is really about turning model capability into orchestrated execution workflows…
The clearest public signal so far is this: Agentic Engineering Patterns > I use the term agentic engineering to describe the practice of developing software with t… In other words…
What matters next is whether this becomes default product plumbing rather than a showcase reserved for a few strong case studies…
whatChangedZh: Simon Willison把工作流继续往产品和开发者工作流里压，重点已经不是演示能力，而是把模型能力变成可编排的执行链路。
whatChangedEn: Simon Willison moved workflow deeper into product and developer workflows, which is really about turning model capability into orchestrated execution workflows.
whyItMattersZh: 行业竞争点正在从“聊天回答得好不好”转向“能不能稳定接进软件、工具链和自动化流程”，这决定了真正的生产力入口。
whyItMattersEn: The competition is moving from chat quality to whether models can sit inside software, tooling, and automation without breaking the workflow around them.
watchNextZh: 后续要看它是否被嵌进真实产品和开发者工作流，以及生态是否围绕它形成新的分发与集成方式。
watchNextEn: What matters next is whether these ideas become default plumbing inside products and developer stacks, not just good demos.
evidenceBulletsZh: Agentic Engineering Patterns > I use the term agentic engineering to describe the practice of developing software with t…
They're agents that can both write and execute code.
Popular examples include Claude Code , OpenAI Codex , and Gemini CLI .
evidenceBulletsEn: Agentic Engineering Patterns > I use the term agentic engineering to describe the practice of developing software with the assistance of coding agents.
They're agents that can both write and execute code.
Popular examples include Claude Code , OpenAI Codex , and Gemini CLI .
impactZh: 后续要看它是否被嵌进真实产品和开发者工作流，以及生态是否围绕它形成新的分发与集成方式。
impactEn: What matters next is whether these ideas become default plumbing inside products and developer stacks, not just good demos.
sourceNoteZh: 目前主要依据公开摘要

目前能确认的公开信号是：Residual connections are one of the least questioned parts of modern Tra… 研究型更新不一定会马上产品化，但它能提示下一阶段能力边界正在往哪边移动。
如果把它放回这几周的节奏里看，更值得追的是它会不会从展示走向默认能力。要看后续是否出现复现、开源实现、API 化，或者被头部产品吸收进默认能力。
narrativeEn: MarkTechPost published a research-led update around research frontier, aimed at pushing the capability frontier outward…
The clearest public signal so far is this: Residual connections are one of the least questioned parts of modern Transformer design. Research updates do not always become products quickly…
Placed in the context of the past few weeks, the bigger question is whether this moves from a signal to a default capability. The next step to watch is replication, open implementation, API exposure…
whatChangedZh: MarkTechPost放出了一项围绕研究前沿的研究型更新，指向的是推动能力边界继续外扩。
whatChangedEn: MarkTechPost published a research-led update around research frontier, aimed at pushing the capability frontier outward.
whyItMattersZh: 研究型更新不一定会马上产品化，但它能提示下一阶段能力边界正在往哪边移动。
whyItMattersEn: Research updates do not always become products quickly, but they often tell you where the capability frontier is starting to bend.
watchNextZh: 要看后续是否出现复现、开源实现、API 化，或者被头部产品吸收进默认能力。
watchNextEn: The next step to watch is replication, open implementation, API exposure, or absorption into mainstream products.
evidenceBulletsZh: Residual connections are one of the least questioned parts of modern Transformer design.
In PreNorm architectures, each layer adds its output back into a running hidden state…
Moonshot AI researchers argue that this standard mechanism also introduces a structural problem…
evidenceBulletsEn: Residual connections are one of the least questioned parts of modern Transformer design.
In PreNorm architectures, each layer adds its output back into a running hidden state, which keeps optimization stable and allows deep models to train.
Moonshot AI researchers argue that this standard mechanism also introduces a structural problem…
impactZh: 要看后续是否出现复现、开源实现、API 化，或者被头部产品吸收进默认能力。
impactEn: The next step to watch is replication, open implementation, API exposure, or absorption into mainstream products.
sourceNoteZh: 目前主要依据公开摘要
